_readme: Accounts YourScore tracks to repurpose into @Yourscore_App_ tweets. 'username' (no @), optional 'note' steers the reword voice/filter, optional 'perRun' overrides how many NEW tweets to pull per run. Global defaults.perRun applies otherwise.

accounts.note: Football news and culture. Punchy, conversational reaction to the moment, especially live World Cup games. Often posts clean action photos we can repost.
World Cup discussion account. Lean into the live match debate and the night's talking points.
Reliable news. React to the genuine World Cup story or result. Skip non-football and pure programming/schedule posts.
Stat-led. Lead with the number, then a real-fan reaction. Often a natural quiz hook (which player, who scored, what record). During the World Cup, prioritise live match stats and records.
